questions.question:
Let \( R_1(a, b, c) \) and \( R_2(x, y, z) \) be two relations in which a is the foreign key of \( R_1 \) that refers to the primary key of \( R_2 \). Consider the following four options.

  1. Insert into \( R_1 \)
  2. Insert into \( R_2 \)
  3. Delete from \( R_1 \)
  4. Delete from \( R_2 \)

Which of the following is correct about the referential integrity constraint with respect to above?



Databases: UGC NET CSE | July 2018 | Part 2 | Question: 69
options: Operations a and b will cause violation
Operations b and c will cause violation
Operations c and d will cause violation
